title: bolanthus fruticulosus
intro: Bolanthus fruticulosus, also known as the Russian melilot or hairy melilot, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Bolanthus fruticulosus is believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
